    Introduction to mdJSONdictio Tabular Data Dictionary Template Setup mdJSONdictio Steps in mdEditor

Introduction to mdJSONdictio

Source: vignettes/01_Intro_mdJSONdictio.Rmd
01_Intro_mdJSONdictio.Rmd


Anyone who has written metadata in mdEditor knows creating dictionaries can be tedious and repetitive. The R package mdJSONdictio aims to streamline this process. Rather than defining data table attributes in mdEditor, users can fill out a tabular data dictionary template and translate it to mdJSON using the function build.mdJSON(). The resultant mdJSON file can be imported in mdEditor to create a Dictionary record with data table attributes already defined. Conversely, the functon build.table() transforms mdEditor data dictionary files into a tabular format to be used as a human-readable reference.

Function Overview


build.mdJSON()

Transforms a tabular data dictionary into an R list that can be subsequently converted to mdJSON and imported to mdEditor as a Dictionary record. The input data frame must be formatted to a template as described in the [Tabular Data Dictionary Template] section. A required parameter is title, which accepts a string to designate the title of the Dictionary record in mdEditor.

A tabular data dictionary imported as a data frame in R: 
#> # A tibble: 463 × 14
#>     codeName           domainItem_name  domainItem_value definition                                                                                                     dataType          allowNull units           unitsResolution isCaseSensitive fieldWidth missingValue minValue maxValue notes
#>     <chr>              <chr>            <chr>            <chr>                                                                                                          <chr>             <chr>     <chr>           <lgl>           <chr>           <lgl>      <lgl>           <dbl>    <dbl> <lgl>
#>   1 SpeciesCode        colname          colname          4-letter American Ornithological Union (AOU) species code of the captured bird                                 character varying no        NA              NA              yes             NA         NA                 NA       NA NA   
#>   2 SpeciesCode        BADE             BADE             Band Destoyed                                                                                                  NA                NA        NA              NA              NA              NA         NA                 NA       NA NA   
#>   3 SpeciesCode        BALO             BALO             Band Lost                                                                                                      NA                NA        NA              NA              NA              NA         NA                 NA       NA NA   
#>   4 BandNumberIn       colname          colname          The 9-digit number on the federal metal band attached to the bird when captured                                integer           yes       NA              NA              NA              NA         NA                 NA       NA NA   
#>   5 BandNumberOut      colname          colname          The 9-digit number on the federal metal band attached to the bird when released                                integer           yes       NA              NA              NA              NA         NA                 NA       NA NA   
#>   6 Year               colname          colname          4-number year of capture; YYYY                                                                                 year              yes       NA              NA              NA              NA         NA                 NA       NA NA   
#>   7 Month              colname          colname          1-2-number month of capture; M or MM                                                                           integer           yes       NA              NA              NA              NA         NA                  1       12 NA   
#>   8 Day                colname          colname          1-2-number day of capture; D or DD                                                                             integer           yes       NA              NA              NA              NA         NA                  1       31 NA   
#>   9 Country            colname          colname          Country of capture location                                                                                    character varying yes       NA              NA              yes             NA         NA                 NA       NA NA   
#>  10 StateProvince      colname          colname          State or province code of capture location                                                                     character varying yes       NA              NA              yes             NA         NA                 NA       NA NA   
#>  11 StateProvince      AK               AK               Alaska, USA                                                                                                    NA                NA        NA              NA              NA              NA         NA                 NA       NA NA   
#>  12 StateProvince      WA               WA               Washington, USA                                                                                                NA                NA        NA              NA              NA              NA         NA                 NA       NA NA   
#>  13 StateProvince      NWT              NWT              Northwest Territories, Canada                                                                                  NA                NA        NA              NA              NA              NA         NA                 NA       NA NA   
#>  14 StateProvince      MAN              MAN              Manitoba, Canada                                                                                               NA                NA        NA              NA              NA              NA         NA                 NA       NA NA   
#>  15 StateProvince      QUE              QUE              Quebec, Canada                                                                                                 NA                NA        NA              NA              NA              NA         NA                 NA       NA NA   
#>  16 City               colname          colname          City or town of capture location                                                                               character varying yes       NA              NA              yes             NA         NA                 NA       NA NA   
#>  17 City               Anchorage        Anchorage        Anchorage, Alaska                                                                                              NA                NA        NA              NA              NA              NA         NA                 NA       NA NA   
#>  18 City               Yellowknife      Yellowknife      Yellowknife, Northwest Territories, Canada                                                                     NA                NA        NA              NA              NA              NA         NA                 NA       NA NA   
#>  19 City               Churchill        Churchill        Churchill, Manitoba, Canada                                                                                    NA                NA        NA              NA              NA              NA         NA                 NA       NA NA   
#>  20 City               Nome             Nome             Nome, Alaska                                                                                                   NA                NA        NA              NA              NA              NA         NA                 NA       NA NA   
#>  21 City               Fairbanks        Fairbanks        Fairbanks, Alaska                                                                                              NA                NA        NA              NA              NA              NA         NA                 NA       NA NA   
#>  22 City               Tok              Tok              Tok, Alaska                                                                                                    NA                NA        NA              NA              NA              NA         NA                 NA       NA NA   
#>  23 Area               colname          colname          Area of capture location; more specific than state or province, though not a city or town                      character varying yes       NA              NA              yes             NA         NA                 NA       NA NA   
#>  24 Area               JBER             JBER             Joint-Base Elmendorf Richardson Air Force Base, Anchorage, Alaska                                              NA                NA        NA              NA              NA              NA         NA                 NA       NA NA   
#>  25 Area               Eielson          Eielson          Eielson Air Force Base, Alaska                                                                                 NA                NA        NA              NA              NA              NA         NA                 NA       NA NA   
#>  26 Area               Grays Harbor     Grays Harbor     Grays Harbor, Washington                                                                                       NA                NA        NA              NA              NA              NA         NA                 NA       NA NA   
#>  27 Area               James Bay        James Bay        James Bay, Canada                                                                                              NA                NA        NA              NA              NA              NA         NA                 NA       NA NA   
#>  28 Area               Kanuti NWR       Kanuti NWR       Kanuti National Wildlife Refuge, Alaska                                                                        NA                NA        NA              NA              NA              NA         NA                 NA       NA NA   
#>  29 Area               Mingan           Mingan           Mingan, Quebec, Canada                                                                                         NA                NA        NA              NA              NA              NA         NA                 NA       NA NA   
#>  30 Area               Cape Krusenstern Cape Krusenstern Cape Krusenstern, Alaska                                                                                       NA                NA        NA              NA              NA              NA         NA                 NA       NA NA   
#>  31 Area               Kakagrak Hills   Kakagrak Hills   Kakagrak Hills, Alaska                                                                                         NA                NA        NA              NA              NA              NA         NA                 NA       NA NA

#>  33 Area               Fort Wainwright  Fort Wainwright  Fort Wainwright Army Base, Fairbanks, Alaska                                                                   NA                NA        NA              NA              NA              NA         NA                 NA       NA NA

#>  35 PlotName           colname          colname          Plot name of capture location; more specific than LocCity or LocArea; refer to 'Master_Locations.csv'          character varying yes       NA              NA              yes             NA         NA                 NA       NA NA   
#>  36 PlotID             colname          colname          Plot ID of capture location; more specific than LocCity or LocArea; refer to 'Master_Locations .csv'           character varying yes       NA              NA              yes             NA         NA                 NA       NA NA   
#>  37 Latitude_dec       colname          colname          Latitude of capture location in decimal degrees                                                                numeric           yes       decimal degrees NA              NA              NA         NA                 NA       NA NA   
#>  38 Longitude_dec      colname          colname          Longitude of capture location in decimal degrees                                                               numeric           yes       decimal degrees NA              NA              NA         NA                 NA       NA NA   
#>  39 Easting            colname          colname          Easting of capture location                                                                                    numeric           yes       NA              NA              NA              NA         NA                 NA       NA NA   
#>  40 Northing           colname          colname          Northing of capture location                                                                                   numeric           yes       NA              NA              NA              NA         NA                 NA       NA NA   
#>  41 Hem                colname          colname          Hemisphere of capture location                                                                                 character         yes       NA              NA              yes             NA         NA                 NA       NA NA   
#>  42 Hem                N                N                Northern                                                                                                       NA                NA        NA              NA              NA              NA         NA                 NA       NA NA   
#>  43 Hem                S                S                Southern                                                                                                       NA                NA        NA              NA              NA              NA         NA                 NA       NA NA   
#>  44 Zone               colname          colname          State Plane Coordinate System zone of capture location                                                         integer           yes       NA              NA              NA              NA         NA                 NA       NA NA

#>  46 ScribeID           colname          colname          Code of the scribe; often first initial, middle initial, and last name                                         character varying yes       NA              NA              yes             NA         NA                 NA       NA NA

#>  51 BBLDisposition     4                4                Destroyed Band                                                                                                 NA                NA        NA              NA              NA              NA         NA                 NA       NA NA

#>  61 BBLStatus          colname          colname          The BBL Status code describing the status of the captured bird and what was done before it was released        character varying yes       NA              NA              NA              NA         NA                 NA       NA NA   
#>  62 BBLStatus          3--              3--              Normal wild bird, Banding or trapping mortality                                                                NA                NA        NA              NA              NA              NA         NA                 NA       NA NA   
#>  63 BBLStatus          5--              5--              Sick, Exhausted, Over-stressed, Injured, or with a Physical Deformity                                          NA                NA        NA              NA              NA              NA         NA                 NA       NA NA

#> 316 Mass_g             colname          colname          Mass of captured brid in grams                                                                                 numeric           yes       grams           NA              NA              NA         NA                 NA       NA NA   
#> 317 FatScore           colname          colname          Fat score of captured bird (0-7)                                                                               integer           yes       NA              NA              NA              NA         NA                 NA       NA NA   
#> 318 FatScore           0                0                No fat in the furculum or anywhere on the body                                                                 NA                NA        NA              NA              NA              NA         NA                 NA       NA NA   
#> 319 FatScore           1                1                Trace; A very small amount of fat in the furcular hollow (< 5% filled)                                         NA                NA        NA              NA              NA              NA         NA                 NA       NA NA   
#> 320 FatScore           2                2                Light; The bottom of the furculum is completely covered but the furcular hollow is less than 1/3 filled        NA                NA        NA              NA              NA              NA         NA                 NA       NA NA   
#> 321 FatScore           3                3                Half; The furcular hollow is about half full, and fat is present under the wingpit and/or on the abdomen       NA                NA        NA              NA              NA              NA         NA                 NA       NA NA   
#> 322 FatScore           4                4                Filled; The furcular hollow is full and a thick layer of fat also occurs under the wing and on the abdomen     NA                NA        NA              NA              NA              NA         NA                 NA       NA NA   
#> 323 FatScore           5                5                Bulging; Fat is bulging slightly above the furculum and well mounded under the wing and on the abdomen         NA                NA        NA              NA              NA              NA         NA                 NA       NA NA   
#> 324 FatScore           6                6                Greatly bulging; Fat is bulging greatly above the furculum and well mounded under the wing and on the abdomen  NA                NA        NA              NA              NA              NA         NA                 NA       NA NA   
#> 325 FatScore           7                7                Very excessive;  fat pads of the furculum, 'wingpit,' and abdomen are bulging so that they join                NA                NA        NA              NA              NA              NA         NA                 NA       NA NA

#> 342 CloacalProtub      0                0                Cloaca not enlarged                                                                                            NA                NA        NA              NA              NA              NA         NA                 NA       NA NA   
#> 343 CloacalProtub      1                1                Small; Cloaca somewhat enlarged and noticeably swollen and the shape is conical                                NA                NA        NA              NA              NA              NA         NA                 NA       NA NA   
#> 344 CloacalProtub      2                2                Medium; Cloacal protuberance large and the shape is cylindrical                                                NA                NA        NA              NA              NA              NA         NA                 NA       NA NA   
#> 345 CloacalProtub      3                3                Large; Cloacal protuberance very large and bulbous                                                             NA                NA        NA              NA              NA              NA         NA                 NA       NA NA   
#> 346 BroodPatch         colname          colname          Brood patch score of captured bird                                                                             character         yes       NA              NA              yes             NA         NA                 NA       NA NA   
#> 347 BroodPatch         0                0                Absent                                                                                                         NA                NA        NA              NA              NA              NA         NA                 NA       NA NA   
#> 348 BroodPatch         1                1                Not completely defeathered                                                                                     NA                NA        NA              NA              NA              NA         NA                 NA       NA NA   
#> 349 BroodPatch         2                2                Well defined, breast muscles and gut still visible through the skin                                            NA                NA        NA              NA              NA              NA         NA                 NA       NA NA   
#> 350 BroodPatch         3                3                Veined and red; the skin is opaque, thickened or engorged, veined and reed with broad, undulating wrinkles     NA                NA        NA              NA              NA              NA         NA                 NA       NA NA   
#> 351 BroodPatch         4                4                Wrinkled, the skin has thin wrinkles, engorgement of the skin has gone                                         NA                NA        NA              NA              NA              NA         NA                 NA       NA NA   
#> 352 BroodPatch         5                5                Feathering over                                                                                                NA                NA        NA              NA              NA              NA         NA                 NA       NA NA   
#> 353 BroodPatch         P                P                Present                                                                                                        NA                NA        NA              NA              NA              NA         NA                 NA       NA NA

BBL Disposition code describing the disposition of the federal metal band attached to the captured bird\"},{\"domainId\":\"ae40bcbe-675e-4c55-b280-d5e6f50208dd\",\"domainItem\":[{\"name\":\"3--\",\"value\":\"3--\",\"definition\":\"Normal wild bird, Banding or trapping mortality\"},{\"name\":\"5--\",\"value\":\"5--\",\"definition\":\"Sick, Exhausted, Over-stressed, Injured, or with a Physical Deformity\"},{\"name\":\"300\",\"value\":\"300\",\"definition\":\"Normal wild bird, Federal numbered metal band only.\"},{\"name\":\"301\",\"value\":\"301\",\"definition\":\"Normal wild bird, Colored leg band(s): plastic, metal, paint, tape.\"},{\"name\":\"310\",\"value\":\"310\",\"definition\":\"All flight feathers on one or both wings clipped or pulled plus auxiliary marker(s).\"},{\"name\":\"315\",\"value\":\"315\",\"definition\":\"Normal wild bird, Mouth swab, plus one or more auxiliary markers used.\"},{\"name\":\"317\",\"value\":\"317\",\"definition\":\"Normal wild bird, Tracheal swab, plus one or more auxiliary markers used.\"},{\"name\":\"318\",\"value\":\"318\",\"definition\":\"Normal wild bird, Blood sample taken\"},{\"name\":\"319\",\"value\":\"319\",\"definition\":\"Normal wild bird, Blood sample taken, plus auxiliary marker(s).\"},{\"name\":\"325\",\"value\":\"325\",\"definition\":\"Normal wild bird, Two or more types of auxiliary markers.\"},{\"name\":\"333\",\"value\":\"333\",\"definition\":\"Normal wild bird, Taken from an artificial nest structure, plus auxiliary marker(s).\"},{\"name\":\"334\",\"value\":\"334\",\"definition\":\"Normal wild bird, Taken from an artificial nest structure, plus auxiliary marker(s).\"},{\"name\":\"380\",\"value\":\"380\",\"definition\":\"Normal wild bird, Satellite/ Cell/ GPS transmitter\"},{\"name\":\"381\",\"value\":\"381\",\"definition\":\"Normal wild bird, Radio transmitter.\"},{\"name\":\"389\",\"value\":\"389\",\"definition\":\"Normal wild bird, transmitter (use 380/381 when applicable)\"},{\"name\":\"390\",\"value\":\"390\",\"definition\":\"Normal wild bird, Datalogger (i.e. geolocator)\"},{\"name\":\"3--\",\"value\":\"3--\",\"definition\":\"Normal wild bird, Banding or trapping mortality\"}],\"codeName\":\"BBLStatus\",\"description\":\"The BBL Status code describing the status of the captured bird and what was done before it was released\"},{\"domainId\":\"8bf55213-bbcf-4c18-9429-a7693d4342ea\",\"domainItem\":[{\"name\":\"2\",\"value\":\"2\",\"definition\":\"Unknown condition of the bird; Band removed\"},{\"name\":\"3\",\"value\":\"3\",\"definition\":\"Dead; Unknown if band was removed\"},{\"name\":\"4\",\"value\":\"4\",\"definition\":\"Dead; Band left on bird\"},{\"name\":\"5\",\"value\":\"5\",\"definition\":\"Dead; Band removed\"},{\"name\":\"6\",\"value\":\"6\",\"definition\":\"Alive - Released; Unknown if band was removed\"},{\"name\":\"7\",\"value\":\"7\",\"definition\":\"Alive - Released; Band left on bird\"},{\"name\":\"8\",\"value\":\"8\",\"definition\":\"Alive \\u2013 Released; Band removed\"},{\"name\":\"9\",\"value\":\"9\",\"definition\":\"Alive - In captivity; Unknown if band was removed\"},{\"name\":\"10\",\"value\":\"10\",\"definition\":\"Alive - In captivity; Band left on bird\"},{\"name\":\"11\",\"value\":\"11\",\"definition\":\"Alive - In captivity; Band removed\"},{\"name\":\"2\",\"value\":\"2\",\"definition\":\"Unknown condition of the bird; Band removed\"}],\"codeName\":\"BBLCondition\",\"description\":\"The BBL Condition code describing the condition of the captured bird and the federal metal colorband\"},{\"name\":\"Db\",\"value\":\"Db\",\"definition\":\"Dark blue colorband\"},{\"name\":\"Dg\",\"value\":\"Dg\",\"definition\":\"Dark green colorband\"},{\"name\":\"Flag\",\"value\":\"Flag\",\"definition\":\"Plastic, field-readable flag placed on the bird's leg\"},{\"name\":\"Geo\",\"value\":\"Geo\",\"definition\":\"Geolocator tag\"},{\"name\":\"Gy\",\"value\":\"Gy\",\"definition\":\"Gray colorband\"},{\"name\":\"Hp\",\"value\":\"Hp\",\"definition\":\"Hot pink colorband\"},{\"name\":\"Lb\",\"value\":\"Lb\",\"definition\":\"Light blue colorband\"},{\"name\":\"Mg\",\"value\":\"Mg\",\"definition\":\"Magenta colorband\"},{\"name\":\"Mv\",\"value\":\"Mv\",\"definition\":\"Mauve colorband\"},{\"name\":\"O\",\"value\":\"O\",\"definition\":\"Orange remiges\"},{\"name\":\"NA\",\"value\":\"NA\",\"definition\":\"Not attempted\"},{\"name\":\"NF\",\"value\":\"NF\",\"definition\":\"Nestling recently fledged, incapable of powered flight\"},{\"name\":\"NL\",\"value\":\"NL\",\"definition\":\"No molt Limit\"},{\"name\":\"NN\",\"value\":\"NN\",\"definition\":\"Nestling in nest (altricials), downy young (precocials)\"},{\"name\":\"OT\",\"value\":\"OT\",\"definition\":\"Other\"},{\"name\":\"PC\",\"value\":\"PC\",\"definition\":\"Primary covert wear and/or shape\"},{\"name\":\"PL\",\"value\":\"PL\",\"definition\":\"Body Plumage\"},{\"name\":\"RC\",\"value\":\"RC\",\"definition\":\"Re-captured bird with USGS color\"},{\"name\":\"FS\",\"value\":\"FS\",\"definition\":\"Feather shape (Primaries or tail)\"},{\"name\":\"IC\",\"value\":\"IC\",\"definition\":\"Inconclusive/conflicting\"},{\"name\":\"LL\",\"value\":\"LL\",\"definition\":\"Laparotomy/laparoscopy\"},{\"name\":\"MB\",\"value\":\"MB\",\"definition\":\"Mouth/bill\"},{\"name\":\"NA\",\"value\":\"NA\",\"definition\":\"Not attempted\"},{\"name\":\"OT\",\"value\":\"OT\",\"definition\":\"Other\"},{\"name\":\"PL\",\"value\":\"PL\",\"definition\":\"Body plumage\"},{\"name\":\"PM\",\"value\":\"PM\",\"definition\":\"Prejuvenile molt\"},{\"name\":\"RC\",\"value\":\"RC\",\"definition\":\"Sexed upon recapture\"},{\"name\":\"SK\",\"value\":\"SK\",\"definition\":\"Skull\"},{\"name\":\"TL\",\"value\":\"TL\",\"definition\":\"Tail length\"},{\"name\":\"WL\",\"value\":\"WL\",\"definition\":\"Wing length\"},{\"name\":\"BO\",\"value\":\"BO\",\"definition\":\"Behavioral observation\"}],\"codeName\":\"BBLHowSexed\",\"description\":\"The BBL HowSexed code describing how the captured bird was sexed; multiple methods seperated by ','\"},{\"domainId\":\"36db5cce-db9b-4ab4-bc3c-494d9e38925b\",\"domainItem\":[{\"name\":\"0\",\"value\":\"0\",\"definition\":\"No fat in the furculum or anywhere on the body\"},{\"name\":\"1\",\"value\":\"1\",\"definition\":\"Trace; A very small amount of fat in the furcular hollow (< 5% filled)\"},{\"name\":\"2\",\"value\":\"2\",\"definition\":\"Light; The bottom of the furculum is completely covered but the furcular hollow is less than 1/3 filled\"},{\"name\":\"3\",\"value\":\"3\",\"definition\":\"Half; The furcular hollow is about half full, and fat is present under the wingpit and/or on the abdomen\"},{\"name\":\"4\",\"value\":\"4\",\"definition\":\"Filled; The furcular hollow is full and a thick layer of fat also occurs under the wing and on the abdomen\"},{\"name\":\"5\",\"value\":\"5\",\"definition\":\"Bulging; Fat is bulging slightly above the furculum and well mounded under the wing and on the abdomen\"},{\"name\":\"6\",\"value\":\"6\",\"definition\":\"Greatly bulging; Fat is bulging greatly above the furculum and well mounded under the wing and on the abdomen\"},{\"name\":\"7\",\"value\":\"7\",\"definition\":\"Very excessive; fat pads of the furculum, 'wingpit,' and abdomen are bulging so that they join\"},{\"name\":\"0\",\"value\":\"0\",\"definition\":\"No fat in the furculum or anywhere on the body\"}],\"codeName\":\"FatScore\",\"description\":\"Fat score of captured bird (0-7)\"},{\"domainId\":\"5223527b-bd90-439a-b497-d3c7aca4bb1a\",\"domainItem\":[{\"name\":\"0\",\"value\":\"0\",\"definition\":\"Cloaca not enlarged\"},{\"name\":\"1\",\"value\":\"1\",\"definition\":\"Small; Cloaca somewhat enlarged and noticeably swollen and the shape is conical\"},{\"name\":\"2\",\"value\":\"2\",\"definition\":\"Medium; Cloacal protuberance large and the shape is cylindrical\"},{\"name\":\"3\",\"value\":\"3\",\"definition\":\"Large; Cloacal protuberance very large and bulbous\"},{\"name\":\"0\",\"value\":\"0\",\"definition\":\"Cloaca not enlarged\"}],\"codeName\":\"CloacalProtub\",\"description\":\"Cloacal protuberance score on captured bird\"},{\"domainId\":\"80a48237-d552-456f-b807-3cfa3e151104\",\"domainItem\":[{\"name\":\"0\",\"value\":\"0\",\"definition\":\"Absent\"},{\"name\":\"1\",\"value\":\"1\",\"definition\":\"Not completely defeathered\"},{\"name\":\"2\",\"value\":\"2\",\"definition\":\"Well defined, breast muscles and gut still visible through the skin\"},{\"name\":\"3\",\"value\":\"3\",\"definition\":\"Veined and red; the skin is opaque, thickened or engorged, veined and reed with broad, undulating wrinkles\"},{\"name\":\"4\",\"value\":\"4\",\"definition\":\"Wrinkled, the skin has thin wrinkles, engorgement of the skin has gone\"},{\"name\":\"5\",\"value\":\"5\",\"definition\":\"Feathering over\"},{\"name\":\"P\",\"value\":\"P\",\"definition\":\"Present\"},{\"name\":\"0\",\"value\":\"0\",\"definition\":\"Absent\"}],\"codeName\":\"BroodPatch\",\"description\":\"Brood patch score of captured bird\"},{\"domainId\":\"ba6acc96-7555-40e7-bedc-48725442e450\",\"domainItem\":[{\"name\":\"0\",\"value\":\"0\",\"definition\":\"No molt limit\"},{\"name\":\"P\",\"value\":\"P\",\"definition\":\"Primaries\"},{\"name\":\"S\",\"value\":\"S\",\"definition\":\"Secondaries\"},{\"name\":\"R\",\"value\":\"R\",\"definition\":\"Rectrices\"},{\"name\":\"C\",\"value\":\"C\",\"definition\":\"Primary upperwing coverts\"},{\"name\":\"U\",\"value\":\"U\",\"definition\":\"Underwing coverts\"},{\"name\":\"G\",\"value\":\"G\",\"definition\":\"Greater upperwing coverts\"},{\"name\":\"V\",\"value\":\"V\",\"definition\":\"Primary coverts vs greater coverts\"},{\"name\":\"L\",\"value\":\"L\",\"definition\":\"Lesser upperwing coverts\"},{\"name\":\"M\",\"value\":\"M\",\"definition\":\"Median upperwing coverts\"},{\"name\":\"B\",\"value\":\"B\",\"definition\":\"Body Feathers\"},{\"name\":\"0\",\"value\":\"0\",\"definition\":\"No molt limit\"}],\"codeName\":\"MoltLimit\",\"description\":\"Code indicating the region where molt limits (two generations of feathers) are present on the captured bird\"},{\"domainId\":\"bdf12234-daf1-4a61-beff-970f7207c9b9\",\"domainItem\":[{\"name\":\"0\",\"value\":\"0\",\"definition\":\"No body molt\"},{\"name\":\"1\",\"value\":\"1\",\"definition\":\"Trace; Only a very few feathers molting anywhere on the bird\\u2019s body in no discernible pattern.\"},{\"name\":\"2\",\"value\":\"2\",\"definition\":\"Light; Fewer than one-third of the contour feathers on the bird are molting\"},{\"name\":\"3\",\"value\":\"3\",\"definition\":\"Medium; From one to two-thirds of a bird\\u2019s contour feathers are in molt.\"},{\"name\":\"4\",\"value\":\"4\",\"definition\":\"Heavy; More than two-thirds of the contour feathers on the bird are in molt.\"},{\"name\":\"0\",\"value\":\"0\",\"definition\":\"No body molt\"}],\"codeName\":\"BodyMolt\",\"description\":\"Body molt score of the captured bird\"},{\"domainId\":\"fe45e789-f5b9-44f5-abfc-2259d196aaf2\",\"domainItem\":[{\"name\":\"0\",\"value\":\"0\",\"definition\":\"No juvenal body plumage.\"},{\"name\":\"1\",\"value\":\"1\",\"definition\":\"Less than half of the juvenal body plumage remains.\"},{\"name\":\"2\",\"value\":\"2\",\"definition\":\"More than half of the juvenal body plumage remains, although the bird already has begun its preformative molt.\"},{\"name\":\"3\",\"value\":\"3\",\"definition\":\"Full juvenal body plumage.\"},{\"name\":\"0\",\"value\":\"0\",\"definition\":\"No juvenal body plumage.\"}],\"codeName\":\"JuvPlumage\",\"description\":\"The presence of juvenal body plumage on captured bird\"},{\"domainId\":\"1f0fad29-7327-4b6b-9167-e4e6eead98c0\",\"domainItem\":[{\"name\":\"N\",\"value\":\"N\",\"definition\":\"None\"},{\"name\":\"S\",\"value\":\"S\",\"definition\":\"Symmetric\"},{\"name\":\"A\",\"value\":\"A\",\"definition\":\"Adventicious\"},{\"name\":\"J\",\"value\":\"J\",\"definition\":\"Juvininle Growth\"},{\"name\":\"N\",\"value\":\"N\",\"definition\":\"None\"}],\"codeName\":\"FlightFeatherMolt\",\"description\":\"Code describing the type of molt occuring in the flight feathers of the varying\",\"definition\":\"Status of the second device attached to the captured bird\",\"domainId\":\"ba06ff58-72d1-4358-8f05-4ff471344efe\",\"isCaseSensitive\":true},{\"allowNull\":true,\"codeName\":\"TagID1\",\"dataType\":\"character varying\",\"definition\":\"Identification number of the device attached to the captured bird\",\"isCaseSensitive\":true},{\"allowNull\":true,\"codeName\":\"TagID2\",\"dataType\":\"character varying\",\"definition\":\"Identification number of the second device attached to the captured bird\",\"isCaseSensitive\":true},{\"allowNull\":true,\"codeName\":\"PlatformID1\",\"dataType\":\"character varying\",\"definition\":\"Platform identification number of the device attached to the captured bird\"},{\"allowNull\":true,\"codeName\":\"PlatformID2\",\"dataType\":\"character varying\",\"definition\":\"Platform identification number of the second device attached to the captured bird\"},{\"allowNull\":true,\"codeName\":\"TagMass1_g\",\"dataType\":\"numeric\",\"definition\":\"Mass of the device attached to the captured bird in grams\",\"units\":\"grams\"},{\"allowNull\":true,\"codeName\":\"TagMass2_g\",\"dataType\":\"numeric\",\"definition\":\"Mass of the second device attached to the captured bird in grams\",\"units\":\"grams\"},{\"allowNull\":true,\"codeName\":\"TagAttachment1\",\"dataType\":\"character varying\",\"definition\":\"Description of how the device is attached to the captured bird\",\"isCaseSensitive\":true},{\"allowNull\":true,\"codeName\":\"TagAttachment2\",\"dataType\":\"character varying\",\"definition\":\"Description of how the second device is attached to the captured bird\",\"isCaseSensitive\":true},{\"allowNull\":true,\"codeName\":\"RadioFrequency_mHz\",\"dataType\":\"numeric\",\"definition\":\"The original radio frequency of the radio tag attached to the captured bird in millihertz.\",\"units\":\"megahertz\"},{\"allowNull\":true,\"codeName\":\"Photos\",\"dataType\":\"binary\",\"definition\":\"Whether photos of the captured bird were collected (Y/N)\",\"isCaseSensitive\":true},{\"allowNull\":true,\"codeName\":\"Notes\",\"dataType\":\"character varying\",\"definition\":\"Additional notes\"}]}]}}"
#> 
#> $data[[1]]$attributes$`date-updated`
#> [1] "2022-03-26T05:34:00.000Z"
#> 
#> 
#> $data[[1]]$type
#> [1] "dictionaries"


build.table()

Transforms an mdEditor mdJSON data dictionary (imported as an R list) into a data frame to be used as a human-readable reference. The output is formatted to the template described in the [Tabular Data Dictionary Template] section. Optional parameters are entity_num and dictionary_num, which accept integers to indicate the dictionary and entity to be processed if more than one exists in the mdJSON file. This is useful when multiple entities are created in the Entity tab of a Dictionary record or multiple dictionaries are exported together in mdEditor. By default, entity_num = 1 and dictionary_num = 1, so if the mdJSON file only has one entity and dictionary, these parameters can be ignored.

Note: Depending on how the Dictionary record was completed in mdEditor, an mdJSON file processed by this function may output a table with additional columns other than those in the tabular data dictionary template. Refer to the mdJSON Data Dictionary to translate these and other mdEditor terms.

An mdJSON data dictionary imported as a list in R: 
#> $data
#> $data[[1]]
#> $data[[1]]$id
#> [1] "892023e4"
#> 
#> $data[[1]]$attributes
#> $data[[1]]$attributes$profile
#> [1] "org.adiwg.profile.full"
#> 
#> $data[[1]]$attributes$json
#> [1] "{\"dictionaryId\":\"4f3f8ff7-5c87-4087-885b-4218a7050c59\",\"dataDictionary\":{\"citation\":{\"title\":\"Example Dictionary\",\"date\":[{\"date\":\"2022-03-22T19:01:00.000Z\",\"dateType\":\"creation\"}],\"responsibleParty\":[{\"party\":[{\"contactId\":\"044210f9-c166-47b6-9936-8927b5763268\"}],\"role\":\"author\"}]},\"subject\":[\"dataDictionary\"],\"entity\":[{\"entityId\":\"afe8eb82-d868-4e15-b519-e8f05e406899\",\"attribute\":[{\"allowNull\":false,\"codeName\":\"SpeciesCode\",\"definition\":\"4-letter American Ornithological Union (AOU) species code of the captured bird\",\"dataType\":\"character varying\",\"isCaseSensitive\":true,\"domainId\":\"9262772c-12f0-4936-9ff7-7b331f196fcb\"},{\"allowNull\":true,\"codeName\":\"BandNumberIn\",\"definition\":\"The 9-digit number on the federal metal band attached to the bird when captured\",\"dataType\":\"integer\"},{\"allowNull\":true,\"codeName\":\"BandNumberOut\",\"definition\":\"The 9-digit number on the federal metal band attached to the bird when released\",\"dataType\":\"integer\"},{\"allowNull\":true,\"codeName\":\"Year\",\"definition\":\"4-number year of capture; YYYY\",\"dataType\":\"year\"},{\"allowNull\":true,\"codeName\":\"Month\",\"definition\":\"1-2-number month of capture; M or MM\",\"dataType\":\"integer\",\"minValue\":\"1\",\"maxValue\":\"12\"},{\"allowNull\":true,\"codeName\":\"Day\",\"definition\":\"1-2-number day of capture; D or DD\",\"dataType\":\"integer\",\"minValue\":\"1\",\"maxValue\":\"31\"},{\"allowNull\":true,\"codeName\":\"Country\",\"definition\":\"Country of capture location\",\"dataType\":\"character varying\",\"isCaseSensitive\":true},{\"allowNull\":true,\"codeName\":\"StateProvince\",\"definition\":\"State or province code of capture location\",\"dataType\":\"character varying\",\"isCaseSensitive\":true,\"domainId\":\"7597f689-6488-4394-a003-85cfa3dede9b\"},{\"allowNull\":true,\"codeName\":\"City\",\"definition\":\"City or town of capture location\",\"dataType\":\"character varying\",\"isCaseSensitive\":true,\"domainId\":\"ba31f755-0870-49b1-aea8-cb17fa858597\"},{\"allowNull\":true,\"codeName\":\"Area\",\"definition\":\"Area of capture location; more specific than state or province, though not a city or town\",\"dataType\":\"character varying\",\"isCaseSensitive\":true,\"domainId\":\"6a5ffd27-6027-4579-82c9-5f30089fcccc\"},{\"allowNull\":true,\"codeName\":\"PlotName\",\"definition\":\"Plot name of capture location; more specific than LocCity or LocArea; refer to 'Master_Locations.csv'\",\"dataType\":\"character varying\",\"isCaseSensitive\":true},{\"allowNull\":true,\"codeName\":\"PlotID\",\"definition\":\"Plot ID of capture location; more specific than LocCity or LocArea; refer to 'Master_Locations .csv'\",\"dataType\":\"character varying\",\"isCaseSensitive\":true},{\"allowNull\":true,\"codeName\":\"Latitude_dec\",\"definition\":\"Latitude of capture location in decimal degrees\",\"dataType\":\"numeric\",\"units\":\"decimal degrees\"},{\"allowNull\":true,\"codeName\":\"Longitude_dec\",\"definition\":\"Longitude of capture location in decimal degrees\",\"dataType\":\"numeric\",\"units\":\"decimal degrees\"},{\"allowNull\":true,\"codeName\":\"Easting\",\"definition\":\"Easting of capture location\",\"dataType\":\"numeric\"},{\"allowNull\":true,\"codeName\":\"Northing\",\"definition\":\"Northing of capture location\",\"dataType\":\"numeric\"},{\"allowNull\":true,\"codeName\":\"Hem\",\"definition\":\"Hemisphere of capture location\",\"dataType\":\"character\",\"isCaseSensitive\":true,\"domainId\":\"370cb732-1cda-4391-ad2b-31a3f85d0b1e\"},{\"allowNull\":true,\"codeName\":\"Zone\",\"definition\":\"State Plane Coordinate System zone of capture location\",\"dataType\":\"integer\"},{\"allowNull\":true,\"codeName\":\"BanderID\",\"definition\":\"Code of the bander, or bird handler for recaptures; often first initial, middle initial, and last name\",\"dataType\":\"character varying\",\"isCaseSensitive\":true},{\"allowNull\":true,\"codeName\":\"ScribeID\",\"definition\":\"Code of the scribe; often first initial, middle initial, and last name\",\"dataType\":\"character varying\",\"isCaseSensitive\":true},{\"allowNull\":true,\"codeName\":\"CaptureTime\",\"definition\":\"Time of bird capture; 24:00\",\"dataType\":\"time\"},{\"allowNull\":true,\"codeName\":\"ReleaseTime\",\"definition\":\"Time of bird release; 24:00\",\"dataType\":\"time\"},{\"allowNull\":true,\"codeName\":\"BBLDisposition\",\"definition\":\"The BBL Disposition code describing the disposition of the federal metal band attached to the captured bird\",\"dataType\":\"character\",\"isCaseSensitive\":true,\"domainId\":\"ae21b097-8d6c-4c56-a3a0-57d61274c482\"},{\"allowNull\":true,\"codeName\":\"BBLStatus\",\"definition\":\"The BBL Status code describing the status of the captured bird and what was done before it was released\",\"dataType\":\"character varying\",\"domainId\":\"23e68641-119f-4b3d-971d-efab8666f01b\"},{\"allowNull\":true,\"codeName\":\"BBLCondition\",\"definition\":\"The BBL Condition code describing the condition of the captured bird and the federal metal band\",\"dataType\":\"integer\",\"domainId\":\"e8c6e964-da11-4ca0-82c9-ab03ed92f9ce\"},{\"allowNull\":true,\"codeName\":\"ULIn\",\"definition\":\"Upper left leg; combination of plastic, field-readable flag placed on the bird's leg when released\",\"dataType\":\"character varying\",\"isCaseSensitive\":true},{\"allowNull\":true,\"codeName\":\"NestID\",\"definition\":\"Unique nest identifier associated with captured bird; based on person who found nest or nest location\",\"dataType\":\"character varying\",\"isCaseSensitive\":true,\"domainId\":\"d22dd5c5-3626-46da-93d4-cc701fd2256b\"},{\"allowNull\":true,\"codeName\":\"Age\",\"definition\":\"Age description of the captured sex of the captured bird as determined in the field\",\"dataType\":\"character\",\"isCaseSensitive\":true,\"domainId\":\"2de6220d-d118-41fe-a739-3ccd8e45816a\"},{\"allowNull\":true,\"codeName\":\"BBLHowAged\",\"definition\":\"The BBL HowAged code describing how the captured bird was aged; multiple methods seperated by ','\",\"dataType\":\"character varying\",\"isCaseSensitive\":true,\"domainId\":\"455d2586-0790-4412-839e-b21da78b5466\"},{\"allowNull\":true,\"codeName\":\"BBLHowSexed\",\"definition\":\"The BBL HowSexed code describing how the varying\",\"isCaseSensitive\":true,\"domainId\":\"81f93b32-fb29-4a87-8685-2cc45d8c6ec1\"},{\"allowNull\":true,\"codeName\":\"Mass_g\",\"definition\":\"Mass of captured brid in grams\",\"dataType\":\"numeric\",\"units\":\"grams\"},{\"allowNull\":true,\"codeName\":\"FatScore\",\"definition\":\"Fat score of captured bird (0-7)\",\"dataType\":\"integer\",\"domainId\":\"5008a03f-8002-4c0d-b7e4-4ada1bc920d6\"},{\"allowNull\":true,\"codeName\":\"TotalHead_mm\",\"definition\":\"Length of the head of the captured bird in millimeters; measured from tip of bill to back of head\",\"dataType\":\"numeric\",\"units\":\"millimeters\"},{\"allowNull\":true,\"codeName\":\"NaresTip_mm\",\"definition\":\"Length from nares to tip of the captured bird in millimeters\",\"dataType\":\"numeric\",\"units\":\"millimeters\"},{\"allowNull\":true,\"codeName\":\"CulmenLength_mm\",\"definition\":\"Culmen length of the captured bird in millimeters; measured from tip of bill to base of bill\",\"dataType\":\"numeric\",\"units\":\"millimeters\"},{\"allowNull\":true,\"codeName\":\"CulmenDepth_mm\",\"definition\":\"Culmen depth of the of the captured brid in millimeters; measured at the distal end of the nares\",\"dataType\":\"numeric\",\"units\":\"millimeters\"},{\"allowNull\":true,\"codeName\":\"CulmenWidth_mm\",\"definition\":\"Culmen width of the captured bird in millimeters; measured at the distal end of the nares\",\"dataType\":\"numeric\",\"units\":\"millimeters\"},{\"allowNull\":true,\"codeName\":\"Tarsus_mm\",\"definition\":\"Length of the tarsometatarsus on the captured bird in millimeters\",\"dataType\":\"numeric\",\"units\":\"millimeters\"},{\"allowNull\":true,\"codeName\":\"Wing_mm\",\"definition\":\"Length of the folded wing of the captured bird in millimeters.\",\"dataType\":\"numeric\",\"units\":\"millimeters\"},{\"allowNull\":true,\"codeName\":\"Tail_mm\",\"definition\":\"Length of central rectrices on the captured bird in millimeters\",\"dataType\":\"numeric\",\"units\":\"millimeters\"},{\"allowNull\":true,\"codeName\":\"Gape_mm\",\"definition\":\"Gape length of the captured bird in millimeters\",\"dataType\":\"numeric\",\"units\":\"millimeters\"},{\"allowNull\":true,\"codeName\":\"LongestPrimary_mm\",\"definition\":\"Length of longest primary of the captured bird in millimeters\",\"dataType\":\"numeric\",\"units\":\"millimeters\"},{\"allowNull\":true,\"codeName\":\"P10_mm\",\"definition\":\"Length of the primary 10 feather on the captured bird in millimeters; measured from skin to tip of feather\",\"dataType\":\"numeric\",\"units\":\"millimeters\"},{\"allowNull\":true,\"codeName\":\"P10Exposed_mm\",\"definition\":\"Length of the exposed primary 10 feather (out of sheathing) on the captured bird in millimeters\",\"dataType\":\"numeric\",\"units\":\"millimeters\"},{\"allowNull\":true,\"codeName\":\"P1Length_mm\",\"definition\":\"Length of primary 1 feather of the captured bird in millimeters\",\"dataType\":\"numeric\",\"units\":\"millimeters\"},{\"allowNull\":true,\"codeName\":\"P1LessCov_mm\",\"definition\":\"Length from primary 1 feather to lesser cover feather of the captured bird in millimeters\",\"dataType\":\"numeric\",\"units\":\"millimeters\"},{\"allowNull\":true,\"codeName\":\"R1Length_mm\",\"definition\":\"Length of rectrix 1 feather of the captured bird in millimeters\",\"dataType\":\"numeric\",\"units\":\"millimeters\"},{\"allowNull\":true,\"codeName\":\"CloacalProtub\",\"definition\":\"Cloacal protuberance score on captured bird\",\"dataType\":\"integer\",\"domainId\":\"d0fbc3bb-7745-42e1-b849-ae3288a099e2\"},{\"allowNull\":true,\"codeName\":\"BroodPatch\",\"definition\":\"Brood patch score of captured bird\",\"dataType\":\"character\",\"isCaseSensitive\":true,\"domainId\":\"58fb24a0-cf46-43b4-80f3-24b68ebd0c83\"},{\"allowNull\":true,\"codeName\":\"BodyCover_dec\",\"definition\":\"Estimated cover of body feathers on the captured bird; percent formatted as a decimal\",\"dataType\":\"numeric\",\"minValue\":\"0\",\"maxValue\":\"1\"},{\"allowNull\":true,\"codeName\":\"FeatherContrast\",\"definition\":\"Whether there is color contrast on the underwing coverts of the captured bird (Y/N)\",\"dataType\":\"binary\",\"isCaseSensitive\":true},{\"allowNull\":true,\"codeName\":\"MoltLimit\",\"definition\":\"Code indicating the region where molt limits (two generations of feathers) are present on the captured bird\",\"dataType\":\"character\",\"isCaseSensitive\":true,\"domainId\":\"0ff3c279-5e34-4739-8b47-dd2b661a38b5\"},{\"allowNull\":true,\"codeName\":\"BodyMolt\",\"definition\":\"Body molt score of the captured bird\",\"dataType\":\"integer\",\"domainId\":\"58e2889b-261a-44c9-a7e4-a110423ee303\"},{\"allowNull\":true,\"codeName\":\"JuvPlumage\",\"definition\":\"The presence of juvenal body plumage on captured bird\",\"dataType\":\"integer\",\"domainId\":\"6d075770-0f57-4b1c-8741-8eb3f8dfaac4\"},{\"allowNull\":true,\"codeName\":\"FlightFeatherMolt\",\"definition\":\"Code describing the type of molt occuring in the flight feathers of the captured bird\",\"dataType\":\"character\",\"isCaseSensitive\":true,\"domainId\":\"c5bf25f6-fd1b-4fb7-bcfa-5c28e0c8a5e8\"},{\"allowNull\":true,\"codeName\":\"FlightFeatherWear\",\"definition\":\"The degree of feather wear on the captured bird (0-5)\",\"dataType\":\"integer\",\"domainId\":\"5d31ef61-e000-40ca-9861-004b5b75e452\"},{\"allowNull\":true,\"codeName\":\"RectMolt\",\"definition\":\"The presence and characteristics of active rectrix feather molt on the captured bird\",\"dataType\":\"integer\",\"domainId\":\"0b6aa5f7-e119-466c-87c8-0f5377dce29d\"},{\"allowNull\":true,\"codeName\":\"RectWear\",\"definition\":\"The degree of rectrix feather wear on the captured bird\",\"dataType\":\"integer\",\"domainId\":\"692dcca7-41b2-4e00-812a-8f9d59fb26a6\"},{\"allowNull\":true,\"codeName\":\"RectShape\",\"definition\":\"Degree of rectrix feather roundness on the captured bird (0-3)\",\"dataType\":\"integer\",\"domainId\":\"db787e39-7167-4ed8-bf65-480d653367ef\"},{\"allowNull\":true,\"codeName\":\"Buccal\",\"definition\":\"Whether a buccal swab sample was collected from captured bird (Y/N)\",\"dataType\":\"binary\",\"isCaseSensitive\":true},{\"allowNull\":true,\"codeName\":\"Fecal\",\"definition\":\"Whether a fecal sample was collected from the captured bird (Y/N)\",\"dataType\":\"binary\",\"isCaseSensitive\":true},{\"allowNull\":true,\"codeName\":\"Nails\",\"definition\":\"Whether a nail sample was collected from the captured bird (Y/N)\",\"dataType\":\"binary\",\"isCaseSensitive\":true},{\"allowNull\":true,\"codeName\":\"Blood\",\"definition\":\"Whether a blood sample was collected from the captured bird (Y/N)\",\"dataType\":\"binary\",\"isCaseSensitive\":true},{\"allowNull\":true,\"codeName\":\"BloodFilter\",\"definition\":\"Whether a blood filter sample was collected from the captured bird (Y/N)\",\"dataType\":\"binary\",\"isCaseSensitive\":true},{\"allowNull\":true,\"codeName\":\"BloodSmear\",\"definition\":\"Whether a blood smear was collected from the captured bird (Y/N)\",\"dataType\":\"binary\",\"isCaseSensitive\":true},{\"allowNull\":true,\"codeName\":\"BloodGenetics\",\"definition\":\"Whether blood was collected from the captured bird for genetic testing (Y/N)\",\"dataType\":\"binary\",\"isCaseSensitive\":true},{\"allowNull\":true,\"codeName\":\"BloodIsotope\",\"definition\":\"Whether blood was collected from the captured bird for isotope analysis (Y/N)\",\"dataType\":\"binary\",\"isCaseSensitive\":true},{\"allowNull\":true,\"codeName\":\"BloodHg\",\"definition\":\"Whether blood was collected from the captured bird for mercury (Hg) contamination testing (Y/N)\",\"dataType\":\"binary\",\"isCaseSensitive\":true},{\"allowNull\":true,\"codeName\":\"Feather\",\"definition\":\"Whether a feather sample was collected from the captured bird (Y/N)\",\"dataType\":\"binary\",\"isCaseSensitive\":true},{\"allowNull\":true,\"codeName\":\"Downy\",\"definition\":\"Whether downy feathers were collected from the captured bird (Y/N)\",\"dataType\":\"binary\",\"isCaseSensitive\":true},{\"allowNull\":true,\"codeName\":\"FeatherIsotope\",\"definition\":\"Whether a feather sample was collected from the captured bird for isotope analysis (Y/N)\",\"dataType\":\"binary\",\"isCaseSensitive\":true},{\"allowNull\":true,\"codeName\":\"FeatherType\",\"definition\":\"Code identifying type of feather collected from the captured bird; specific feather number provided, if known\",\"dataType\":\"character collected (Y/N)\",\"dataType\":\"binary\",\"isCaseSensitive\":true},{\"allowNull\":true,\"codeName\":\"Notes\",\"definition\":\"Additional notes\",\"dataType\":\"character varying\"}],\"definition\":\"\\\"Data dictionary describing banding datasets. This is a generalized dictionary, so some attributes and entry values defined in this dictionary may not be included in the associated dataset or collection.\",\"codeName\":\"Banding\"}],\"domain\":[{\"domainId\":\"9262772c-12f0-4936-9ff7-7b331f196fcb\",\"codeName\":\"SpeciesCode\",\"domainItem\":[{\"name\":\"BADE\",\"value\":\"BADE\",\"definition\":\"Band Destoyed\"},{\"name\":\"BALO\",\"value\":\"BALO\",\"definition\":\"Band Lost\"}],\"description\":\"4-letter American Ornithological Union (AOU) species code of the captured bird\"},{\"domainId\":\"7597f689-6488-4394-a003-85cfa3dede9b\",\"codeName\":\"StateProvince\",\"domainItem\":[{\"name\":\"AK\",\"value\":\"AK\",\"definition\":\"Alaska, Band 2nd\"},{\"name\":\"X\",\"value\":\"X\",\"definition\":\"Banding Mortality\"}],\"description\":\"The BBL Disposition code describing the disposition of the federal metal band attached to the captured bird\"},{\"domainId\":\"23e68641-119f-4b3d-971d-efab8666f01b\",\"codeName\":\"BBLStatus\",\"domainItem\":[{\"name\":\"3--\",\"value\":\"3--\",\"definition\":\"Normal wild bird, Banding or trapping mortality\"},{\"name\":\"5--\",\"value\":\"5--\",\"definition\":\"Sick, Exhausted, Over-stressed, Injured, or with a Physical Deformity\"},{\"name\":\"300\",\"value\":\"300\",\"definition\":\"Normal wild bird, Federal numbered metal band only.\"},{\"name\":\"301\",\"value\":\"301\",\"definition\":\"Normal wild bird, Colored leg band(s): plastic, metal, paint, tape.\"},{\"name\":\"310\",\"value\":\"310\",\"definition\":\"All flight feathers on one or both wings clipped or pulled plus auxiliary marker(s).\"},{\"name\":\"315\",\"value\":\"315\",\"definition\":\"Normal wild bird, Mouth swab, plus one or more auxiliary markers used.\"},{\"name\":\"317\",\"value\":\"317\",\"definition\":\"Normal wild bird, Tracheal swab, plus one or more auxiliary markers used.\"},{\"name\":\"318\",\"value\":\"318\",\"definition\":\"Normal wild bird, Blood sample taken\"},{\"name\":\"319\",\"value\":\"319\",\"definition\":\"Normal wild bird, Blood sample taken, plus auxiliary marker(s).\"},{\"name\":\"325\",\"value\":\"325\",\"definition\":\"Normal wild bird, Two or more types of auxiliary markers.\"},{\"name\":\"333\",\"value\":\"333\",\"definition\":\"Normal wild bird, Taken from an artificial nest structure, plus auxiliary marker(s).\"},{\"name\":\"334\",\"value\":\"334\",\"definition\":\"Normal wild bird, Taken from an artificial nest structure, plus auxiliary marker(s).\"},{\"name\":\"380\",\"value\":\"380\",\"definition\":\"Normal wild bird, Satellite/ Cell/ GPS transmitter\"},{\"name\":\"381\",\"value\":\"381\",\"definition\":\"Normal wild bird, Radio bird, Datalogger (i.e. geolocator)\"}],\"description\":\"The BBL Status code describing the status of the captured bird and what was done before it was oviduct\"},{\"name\":\"EY\",\"value\":\"EY\",\"definition\":\"Eye color\"},{\"name\":\"FB\",\"value\":\"FB\",\"definition\":\"Fault bar\"},{\"name\":\"FF\",\"value\":\"FF\",\"definition\":\"Flight feathers (remiges), condition or color\"},{\"name\":\"IC\",\"value\":\"IC\",\"definition\":\"Inconclusive, Conflicting\"},{\"name\":\"LP\",\"value\":\"LP\",\"definition\":\"Molt limit present\"},{\"name\":\"MB\",\"value\":\"MB\",\"definition\":\"Mouth/bill\"},{\"name\":\"MR\",\"value\":\"MR\",\"definition\":\"Actively-molting remiges\"},{\"name\":\"NA\",\"value\":\"NA\",\"definition\":\"Not attempted\"},{\"name\":\"NF\",\"value\":\"NF\",\"definition\":\"Nestling recently fledged, incapable of powered flight\"},{\"name\":\"NL\",\"value\":\"NL\",\"definition\":\"No molt Limit\"},{\"name\":\"NN\",\"value\":\"NN\",\"definition\":\"Nestling in nest (altricials), downy young (precocials)\"},{\"name\":\"OT\",\"value\":\"OT\",\"definition\":\"Other\"},{\"name\":\"PC\",\"value\":\"PC\",\"definition\":\"Primary covert wear and/or shape\"},{\"name\":\"PL\",\"value\":\"PL\",\"definition\":\"Body Plumage\"},{\"name\":\"RC\",\"value\":\"RC\",\"definition\":\"Re-captured bird with USGS band\"},{\"name\":\"SK\",\"value\":\"SK\",\"definition\":\"Skull\"},{\"name\":\"TL\",\"value\":\"TL\",\"definition\":\"Tail length\"},{\"name\":\"TS\",\"value\":\"TS\",\"definition\":\"Tail shape or wear\"}],\"description\":\"The BBL HowAged code describing how the captured bird was aged; multiple methods seperated by ','\"},{\"domainId\":\"81f93b32-fb29-4a87-8685-2cc45d8c6ec1\",\"codeName\":\"BBLHowSexed\",\"domainItem\":[{\"name\":\"BO\",\"value\":\"BO\",\"definition\":\"Behavioral observation\"},{\"name\":\"BP\",\"value\":\"BP\",\"definition\":\"Brood patch\"},{\"name\":\"CC\",\"value\":\"CC\",\"definition\":\"Combination of characteristics or measurements\"},{\"name\":\"CL\",\"value\":\"CL\",\"definition\":\"Cloaca\"},{\"name\":\"DN\",\"value\":\"DN\",\"definition\":\"DNA/chromosome analysis\"},{\"name\":\"EG\",\"value\":\"EG\",\"definition\":\"Egg in oviduct\"},{\"name\":\"EY\",\"value\":\"EY\",\"definition\":\"Eye color\"},{\"name\":\"FS\",\"value\":\"FS\",\"definition\":\"Feather shape (Primaries or tail)\"},{\"name\":\"IC\",\"value\":\"IC\",\"definition\":\"Inconclusive/conflicting\"},{\"name\":\"LL\",\"value\":\"LL\",\"definition\":\"Laparotomy/laparoscopy\"},{\"name\":\"MB\",\"value\":\"MB\",\"definition\":\"Mouth/bill\"},{\"name\":\"NA\",\"value\":\"NA\",\"definition\":\"Not attempted\"},{\"name\":\"OT\",\"value\":\"OT\",\"definition\":\"Other\"},{\"name\":\"PL\",\"value\":\"PL\",\"definition\":\"Body plumage\"},{\"name\":\"PM\",\"value\":\"PM\",\"definition\":\"Prejuvenile molt\"},{\"name\":\"RC\",\"value\":\"RC\",\"definition\":\"Sexed upon recapture\"},{\"name\":\"SK\",\"value\":\"SK\",\"definition\":\"Skull\"},{\"name\":\"TL\",\"value\":\"TL\",\"definition\":\"Tail length\"},{\"name\":\"WL\",\"value\":\"WL\",\"definition\":\"Wing length\"}],\"description\":\"The BBL HowSexed code describing how the captured bird was sexed; multiple methods seperated by ','\"},{\"domainId\":\"5008a03f-8002-4c0d-b7e4-4ada1bc920d6\",\"codeName\":\"FatScore\",\"domainItem\":[{\"name\":\"0\",\"value\":\"0\",\"definition\":\"No fat in the furculum or anywhere on the body\"},{\"name\":\"1\",\"value\":\"1\",\"definition\":\"Trace; A very small amount of fat in the furcular hollow (< 5% filled)\"},{\"name\":\"2\",\"value\":\"2\",\"definition\":\"Light; The bottom of the furculum is completely covered but the furcular hollow is less than 1/3 filled\"},{\"name\":\"3\",\"value\":\"3\",\"definition\":\"Half; The furcular hollow is about half full, and fat is present under the wingpit and/or on the abdomen\"},{\"name\":\"4\",\"value\":\"4\",\"definition\":\"Filled; The furcular hollow is full and a thick layer of fat also occurs under the wing and on the abdomen\"},{\"name\":\"5\",\"value\":\"5\",\"definition\":\"Bulging; Fat is bulging slightly above the furculum and well mounded under the wing and on the abdomen\"},{\"name\":\"6\",\"value\":\"6\",\"definition\":\"Greatly bulging; Fat is bulging greatly above the furculum and well mounded under the wing and on the abdomen\"},{\"name\":\"7\",\"value\":\"7\",\"definition\":\"Very excessive;  fat pads of the furculum, 'wingpit,' and abdomen are bulging so that they join\"}],\"description\":\"Fat score of captured bird (0-7)\"},{\"domainId\":\"d0fbc3bb-7745-42e1-b849-ae3288a099e2\",\"codeName\":\"CloacalProtub\",\"domainItem\":[{\"name\":\"0\",\"value\":\"0\",\"definition\":\"Cloaca not enlarged\"},{\"name\":\"1\",\"value\":\"1\",\"definition\":\"Small; Cloaca somewhat enlarged and noticeably swollen and the shape is conical\"},{\"name\":\"2\",\"value\":\"2\",\"definition\":\"Medium; Cloacal protuberance large and the shape is cylindrical\"},{\"name\":\"3\",\"value\":\"3\",\"definition\":\"Large; Cloacal protuberance very large and bulbous\"}],\"description\":\"Cloacal protuberance score on captured bird\"},{\"domainId\":\"58fb24a0-cf46-43b4-80f3-24b68ebd0c83\",\"codeName\":\"BroodPatch\",\"domainItem\":[{\"name\":\"0\",\"value\":\"0\",\"definition\":\"Absent\"},{\"name\":\"1\",\"value\":\"1\",\"definition\":\"Not completely defeathered\"},{\"name\":\"2\",\"value\":\"2\",\"definition\":\"Well defined, breast muscles and gut still visible through the skin\"},{\"name\":\"3\",\"value\":\"3\",\"definition\":\"Veined and red; the skin is opaque, thickened or engorged, veined and reed with broad, undulating wrinkles\"},{\"name\":\"4\",\"value\":\"4\",\"definition\":\"Wrinkled, the skin has thin wrinkles, engorgement of the skin has gone\"},{\"name\":\"5\",\"value\":\"5\",\"definition\":\"Feathering over\"},{\"name\":\"P\",\"value\":\"P\",\"definition\":\"Present\"}],\"description\":\"Brood patch score of captured bird\"},{\"domainId\":\"0ff3c279-5e34-4739-8b47-dd2b661a38b5\",\"codeName\":\"MoltLimit\",\"domainItem\":[{\"name\":\"0\",\"value\":\"0\",\"definition\":\"No molt limit\"},{\"name\":\"P\",\"value\":\"P\",\"definition\":\"Primaries\"},{\"name\":\"S\",\"value\":\"S\",\"definition\":\"Secondaries\"},{\"name\":\"R\",\"value\":\"R\",\"definition\":\"Rectrices\"},{\"name\":\"C\",\"value\":\"C\",\"definition\":\"Primary upperwing coverts\"},{\"name\":\"U\",\"value\":\"U\",\"definition\":\"Underwing coverts\"},{\"name\":\"G\",\"value\":\"G\",\"definition\":\"Greater upperwing coverts\"},{\"name\":\"V\",\"value\":\"V\",\"definition\":\"Primary coverts vs greater coverts\"},{\"name\":\"L\",\"value\":\"L\",\"definition\":\"Lesser upperwing coverts\"},{\"name\":\"M\",\"value\":\"M\",\"definition\":\"Median upperwing coverts\"},{\"name\":\"B\",\"value\":\"B\",\"definition\":\"Body Feathers\"}],\"description\":\"Code indicating the region where molt limits (two generations of feathers) are present on the captured bird\"},{\"domainId\":\"58e2889b-261a-44c9-a7e4-a110423ee303\",\"codeName\":\"BodyMolt\",\"domainItem\":[{\"name\":\"0\",\"value\":\"0\",\"definition\":\"No body molt\"},{\"name\":\"1\",\"value\":\"1\",\"definition\":\"Trace; Only a very few feathers molting anywhere on the bird’s body in no discernible pattern.\"},{\"name\":\"2\",\"value\":\"2\",\"definition\":\"Light; Fewer than one-third of the contour feathers on the bird are molting\"},{\"name\":\"3\",\"value\":\"3\",\"definition\":\"Medium; From one to two-thirds of a bird’s contour feathers are in molt.\"},{\"name\":\"4\",\"value\":\"4\",\"definition\":\"Heavy; More than two-thirds of the contour feathers on the bird are in molt.\"}],\"description\":\"Body molt score of the captured bird\"},{\"domainId\":\"6d075770-0f57-4b1c-8741-8eb3f8dfaac4\",\"codeName\":\"JuvPlumage\",\"domainItem\":[{\"name\":\"0\",\"value\":\"0\",\"definition\":\"No juvenal body plumage.\"},{\"name\":\"1\",\"value\":\"1\",\"definition\":\"Less than half of the juvenal body plumage remains.\"},{\"name\":\"2\",\"value\":\"2\",\"definition\":\"More than half of the juvenal body plumage remains, although the bird already has begun its preformative molt.\"},{\"name\":\"3\",\"value\":\"3\",\"definition\":\"Full juvenal body plumage.\"}],\"description\":\"The presence of juvenal body plumage on captured bird\"},{\"domainId\":\"c5bf25f6-fd1b-4fb7-bcfa-5c28e0c8a5e8\",\"codeName\":\"FlightFeatherMolt\",\"domainItem\":[{\"name\":\"N\",\"value\":\"N\",\"definition\":\"None\"},{\"name\":\"S\",\"value\":\"S\",\"definition\":\"Symmetric\"},{\"name\":\"A\",\"value\":\"A\",\"definition\":\"Adventicious\"},{\"name\":\"J\",\"value\":\"J\",\"definition\":\"Juvininle Growth\"}],\"description\":\"Code describing the type of molt occuring in the flight feathers of the captured bird\"},{\"domainId\":\"5d31ef61-e000-40ca-9861-004b5b75e452\",\"codeName\":\"FlightFeatherWear\",\"domainItem\":[{\"name\":\"0\",\"value\":\"0\",\"definition\":\"None\"},{\"name\":\"1\",\"value\":\"1\",\"definition\":\"Slight\"},{\"name\":\"2\",\"value\":\"2\",\"definition\":\"Light\"},{\"name\":\"3\",\"value\":\"3\",\"definition\":\"Moderate\"},{\"name\":\"4\",\"value\":\"4\",\"definition\":\"Heavy\"},{\"name\":\"5\",\"value\":\"5\",\"definition\":\"Excessive\"}],\"description\":\"The degree of feather wear on the captured bird (0-5)\"},{\"domainId\":\"0b6aa5f7-e119-466c-87c8-0f5377dce29d\",\"codeName\":\"RectMolt\",\"domainItem\":[{\"name\":\"0\",\"value\":\"0\",\"definition\":\"No molt\"},{\"name\":\"1\",\"value\":\"1\",\"definition\":\"Juvenile molt\"},{\"name\":\"2\",\"value\":\"2\",\"definition\":\"Symmetrical molt\"},{\"name\":\"3\",\"value\":\"3\",\"definition\":\"Adventitious\"}],\"description\":\"The presence and characteristics of active rectrix feather molt on the captured bird\"},{\"domainId\":\"692dcca7-41b2-4e00-812a-8f9d59fb26a6\",\"codeName\":\"RectWear\",\"domainItem\":[{\"name\":\"0\",\"value\":\"0\",\"definition\":\"None\"},{\"name\":\"1\",\"value\":\"1\",\"definition\":\"Slight\"},{\"name\":\"2\",\"value\":\"2\",\"definition\":\"Light\"},{\"name\":\"3\",\"value\":\"3\",\"definition\":\"Moderate\"},{\"name\":\"4\",\"value\":\"4\",\"definition\":\"Heavy\"},{\"name\":\"5\",\"value\":\"5\",\"definition\":\"Excessive\"}],\"description\":\"The degree of rectrix feather wear on the captured bird\"},{\"domainId\":\"db787e39-7167-4ed8-bf65-480d653367ef\",\"codeName\":\"RectShape\",\"domainItem\":[{\"name\":\"0\",\"value\":\"0\",\"definition\":\"Pointed\"},{\"name\":\"1\",\"value\":\"1\",\"definition\":\"Somewhat pointed\"},{\"name\":\"2\",\"value\":\"2\",\"definition\":\"Somewhat rounded\"},{\"name\":\"3\",\"value\":\"3\",\"definition\":\"Rounded\"}],\"description\":\"Degree of rectrix feather roundness on the captured bird (0-3)\"},{\"domainId\":\"8b06b2c6-e76a-4965-8e2b-370662db1e03\",\"codeName\":\"FeatherType\",\"domainItem\":[{\"name\":\"PC\",\"value\":\"PC\",\"definition\":\"Primary Covert; wing flight feather\"},{\"name\":\"GC\",\"value\":\"GC\",\"definition\":\"Greater Covert; wing flight feather\"},{\"name\":\"P\",\"value\":\"P\",\"definition\":\"Primary Remex; wing flight feather\"},{\"name\":\"S\",\"value\":\"S\",\"definition\":\"Secondary Remex; wing flight feather\"},{\"name\":\"T\",\"value\":\"T\",\"definition\":\"Tertial Remex; wing flight feather\"},{\"name\":\"R\",\"value\":\"R\",\"definition\":\"Retrix; tail flight feather\"},{\"name\":\"down\",\"value\":\"down\",\"definition\":\"down feather\"},{\"name\":\"contour\",\"value\":\"contour\",\"definition\":\"contour feather\"},{\"name\":\"semiplume\",\"value\":\"semiplume\",\"definition\":\"semiplume feather\"},{\"name\":\"filoplume\",\"value\":\"filoplume\",\"definition\":\"filoplume feather\"},{\"name\":\"body\",\"value\":\"body\",\"definition\":\"unspecified body feather (down, contour, semiplume, or filoplume)\"},{\"name\":\"bristle\",\"value\":\"bristle\",\"definition\":\"bristle feather\"}],\"description\":\"Code identifying type of feather collected from the captured bird; specific feather number provided, if known\"},{\"domainId\":\"8ccdd20d-a02a-4bc9-9b7e-3b94a61b968e\",\"codeName\":\"TagType1\",\"domainItem\":[{\"name\":\"Geo\",\"value\":\"Geo\",\"definition\":\"Geolocator tag\"},{\"name\":\"GPS\",\"value\":\"GPS\",\"definition\":\"GPS tag\"},{\"name\":\"Radio\",\"value\":\"Radio\",\"definition\":\"Radio tag\"}],\"description\":\"Type of device attached to the captured bird\"},{\"domainId\":\"d3c1a634-592b-4b4a-989d-421590d02d93\",\"codeName\":\"TagType2\",\"domainItem\":[{\"name\":\"Geo\",\"value\":\"Geo\",\"definition\":\"Geolocator tag\"},{\"name\":\"GPS\",\"value\":\"GPS\",\"definition\":\"GPS tag\"},{\"name\":\"Radio\",\"value\":\"Radio\",\"definition\":\"Radio tag\"}],\"description\":\"Type of second device attached to the captured bird\"},{\"domainId\":\"9f56e825-b009-45f8-b163-707c70e7d046\",\"codeName\":\"TagStatus1\",\"domainItem\":[{\"name\":\"Deployed\",\"value\":\"Deployed\",\"definition\":\"Deployed tag\"},{\"name\":\"Removed\",\"value\":\"Removed\",\"definition\":\"Removed tag\"},{\"name\":\"Replaced\",\"value\":\"Replaced\",\"definition\":\"Replaced tag\"},{\"name\":\"Retained\",\"value\":\"Retained\",\"definition\":\"Retained tag\"},{\"name\":\"Lost\",\"value\":\"Lost\",\"definition\":\"Lost tag\"}],\"description\":\"Status of the device attached to the captured bird\"},{\"domainId\":\"63c51131-8ef6-445f-b117-1ae09049d46f\",\"codeName\":\"TagStatus2\",\"domainItem\":[{\"name\":\"Deployed\",\"value\":\"Deployed\",\"definition\":\"Deployed tag\"},{\"name\":\"Removed\",\"value\":\"Removed\",\"definition\":\"Removed tag\"},{\"name\":\"Replaced\",\"value\":\"Replaced\",\"definition\":\"Replaced tag\"},{\"name\":\"Retained\",\"value\":\"Retained\",\"definition\":\"Retained tag\"},{\"name\":\"Lost\",\"value\":\"Lost\",\"definition\":\"Lost tag\"}],\"description\":\"Status of the second device attached to the captured bird\"}],\"responsibleParty\":{\"party\":[{\"contactId\":\"044210f9-c166-47b6-9936-8927b5763268\"}],\"role\":\"author\"},\"description\":\"Data dictionary describing banding datasets. This is a generalized dictionary, so some attributes and entry values defined in this dictionary may not be included in the associated dataset or collection.\",\"dictionaryIncludedWithResource\":true}}"

Intented Use

mdJSONdictio functions are intended for anyone who writes mdEditor metadata. build.mdJSON() helps ease the process of creating mdEditor Dictionary records by allowing users to complete some fields in a simplified tabular format. build.table() creates a human-readable data dictionary reference for an mdEditor Dictionary record. A potential workflow is to use build.mdJSON() to initiate a Dictionary record, the mdEditor web application to maintain the Dictionary record, and build.table() to create an up-to-date human-readable data dictionary as needed.
